title: Paler Gardens
description: A modpack made to add content to the pale gardens as well as adding some QoL mods :)
body:
Paler Gardens is a modpack made to improve the Pale Gardens as well as adding some quality of life features.

It is mainly made to be used in a Fully Pale Gardens World but can be used aside other modpacks to improve your survival worlds :)

(Sidenote : If you plan on making a world with only pale gardens, be carefull, as no passive mobs spawns in this biome !)

It also has the Hysteria Shaders included witch adds to the overall creepy vibe of the biome !
Here are some screenshots of the modpack :)

![Paler Gardens Screenshot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/134b6ea8a366adcf95b99fd85f94cb7c9b7e45eb.jpeg)

![Paler Gardens Screenshot 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33d4e941f6651eef187ff7a3994f694d99464510.jpeg)

![Paler Gardens Screenshot 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bd84597ac1d8e2712245d76bacb335f5f8e2f0b.jpeg)

![Paler Gardens Screenshot 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/423291175b3f00261dec9f1d60988c8074546e0c.jpeg)

![Paler Gardens Screenshot 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20554ffab15b4db5a5dfbe16974818e6c519b798.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
